name: psql
description: Run PostgreSQL SQL queries with simplified connection string (defaults: test/test@localhost:5432/test), supports -c SQL, -f script, stdin pipes, --head=N, --grep=PATTERN, and --quiet.

parameters.name: --grep=PATTERN
parameters.description: Filter output lines matching extended regex

examples.expected: Returns row count from users table (first 10 lines)

cost_saving_rationale: Eliminates repeating PGPASSWORD=... psql -U test -h localhost -p 5432 -d test boilerplate (70+ chars) on every query, saving ~70 chars per invocation and making queries readable.
